# table_cohort_attrition { #cdmconnector.table_cohort_attrition }

```python
table_cohort_attrition(result, *, header=None, group_column=None, hide=None)
```

Format a summarise_cohort_attrition result into a table.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                                                               | Description   | Default    |
|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| result       | SummarisedResult or DataFrame.                                     |               | _required_ |
| header       | Columns for header.                                                |               | `None`     |
| group_column | Extra grouping columns. Default \[\"cdm_name\", \"group_level\"\]. |               | `None`     |
| hide         | Columns to hide.                                                   |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |
